scenarios.name: track_catalog_join
scenarios.description: Catalog join from tracks through albums to artists over most of the track table.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
        -> Filter
            -> Table "tracks" as "T" Access By ID
                -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY10" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
        -> Filter
            -> Table "albums" as "A" Access By ID
                -> Bitmap
                    -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY1" Unique Scan
        -> Filter
            -> Table "artists" as "AR" Access By ID
                -> Bitmap
                    -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY2" Unique Scan

scenarios.name: invoice_customer_rollup
scenarios.description: Grouped invoice-line revenue rollup by customer over the main sales catalog.
scenarios.plan:
Select Expression
    -> Sort (record length: 84, key length: 32)
        -> Aggregate
            -> Sort (record length: 148, key length: 12)
                -> Filter
                    -> Hash Join (inner)
                        -> Nested Loop Join (inner)
                            -> Filter
                                -> Table "invoice_items" as "II" Access By ID
                                    -> Bitmap
                                        -> Index "IFK_InvoiceLineTrackId" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
                            -> Filter
                                -> Table "invoices" as "I" Access By ID
                                    -> Bitmap
                                        -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY7" Unique Scan
                            -> Filter
                                -> Table "customers" as "C" Access By ID
                                    -> Bitmap
                                        -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY3" Unique Scan
                        -> Record Buffer (record length: 33)
                            -> Filter
                                -> Table "tracks" as "T" Access By ID
                                    -> Bitmap
                                        -> Index "RDB$PRIMARY10" Range Scan (lower bound: 1/1, upper bound: 1/1)
